title: olearia lyallii
intro: Olearia lyallii, also known as tree daisy, is a flowering plant native to New Zealand. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its flavonoids and terpenoids compounds. The health benefits of Olearia lyallii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory conditions, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or tincture, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal herb.
